blended.narrative: Welch Village is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 765 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 1.5" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 22 mph.
